assumptions: Third score metric mapped to distance (packet field); explicit ambiguity is marked needs_review.
Normalization is min-max to 0-100 per metric using only embedded packet records.
Remediation effects are multiplicative reductions to normalized first/second/third metrics.
Distance values normalized with observed packet min/max 0..1.
Workbook formulas and static scenario tables were both generated from the embedded packet only.

results_summary.best_feasible_classification: R1 pass, R2 pass, R3 pass, R4 warn

sensitivity.reason: Predicted_value +/-5% for selected records changes classification of R3 in multiple scenarios.
